_codex_staging.notes: Chevron transcript source research deposit for FY Q1 2022 through FY Q1 2026. Official Chevron materials were found in prior handoff, but no official written transcript was verified; StockAnalysis transcript pages provide readable transcript text.

research_scope: FY Q1 2022 through FY Q1 2026 inclusive
source_policy_applied: Readable earnings-call transcript text is accepted; source classification is provenance, not a blocker. Third-party rows retain usage_caution.
